steps.title: Write the product
steps.content: Substitute the two function rules into $g(x)\cdot h(x)$: $$(\frac{4}{7}x+\frac{9}{5})(5x-7)$$

steps.title: Combine the middle terms
steps.content: The middle terms combine as $-4x+9x=5x$, so the product after distribution is $$\frac{20x^2}{7}+5x-\frac{63}{5}$$ Choice A omits the middle term, and choice C has its sign wrong. The answer is D.
